title: H_001 Flat-band quantum geometry → ambient (293 K @ 1 atm) superconductor. Tests whether a high-Chern flat band with large ∫tr g enters the room-T two-lever design box. REFUTED.

verdict: 🟠 INCONCLUSIVE — Li2CuH6/Mg2IrH6 ambient-dynamically-unstable; AcBeH8 / B-C clathrates vc-relax non-converged (pods down, deferred per d_defer_no_delete). No ambient-stable candidate reached the Tc gate.

title: H_006 Is the FS two-lever geometry lever (∫tr g) dimension-invariant? Promotes brainstorm seed F2 to a frozen card. Toy probe: REFUTED (extensive).
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → DIMENSION-EXTENSIVE (toy) + REAL-3D done (src/fbgeom_3d.py): 3D Tc lever L_3D=1.84x (BKT-vortex 1.50 x coordination 1.22) is REAL but PARTIAL — closes only ~21% of the ~5x room-T gap; native 3D flat bands (pyrochlore/hyperkagome/3D-Lieb) are GAPLESS band-touchings -> geometry contaminated, clean dimension-FRAME bypass BLOCKED. 3D is an additive lever (stacked in H_007), not a wall-removal.

title: H_003 The +@ combination (bilayer division-of-labor, M1 SPLIT) enters the room-T two-lever box no single host can — geometry in layer A, stiff glue proximity-imported from layer B.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → BOX-OPENS-AT-IDEAL-INTERFACE — +@ bilayer enters the box (eta*=0.73, omega_eff=130meV, g_eff=2.87) the single CoSn host cannot, but only via a phonon-transparent/electron-opaque interface (critical electron_cost=0.415) and only to bkt_Tc~59K (box cleared, room-T not). 6/6 falsifiers PASS. SPLIT relocates the wall into an interface criterion, does not remove it.

title: H_004 The +@ box reaches room-T only with an electronic (eV-class) glue — a phonon glue tops out ~91 K (M3 BORROW).
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → PHONON-GLUE-INSUFFICIENT — room-T via the +@ box needs Omega~643meV, above the phonon ceiling (200meV -> tc_max~91K); only an electronic eV-class reservoir (exciton/plasmon/magnon) can supply it, relocating the wall to 'pair without a competing instability'. 5/5 falsifiers PASS.

title: H_005 The +@ combination stack (geometry-import x electronic glue x ideal interface) reaches the 293 K box in the toy band — each lever necessary, breakthrough conditional on 2 stacked unsolved sub-problems.
verdict: 🟢 MODEL-PROBE → ROOM-T REACHABLE IN TOY BAND — full stack: g_eff=2.87, omega_eff=700meV -> bkt_Tc~319K (room-T CLEARED); ablate glue->91K FAILS, ablate geometry->box closes, ablate interface->box closes (each lever necessary). 5/5 falsifiers PASS. Breakthrough is a FACTORIZATION: room-T wall -> (a) electron-opaque interface + (b) competing-order-free electronic glue. Real verdict needs DFT heterostructure (src/+pod).

title: H_007 A 3-lever stack (geometry x electronic glue x real 3D lever) reaches room-T by RELAXING each lever's demand 1.84x — 3-combination beats 2-combination, each lever necessary.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → 3-LEVER RELAXES DEMAND — adding the real 3D lever (L_3D=1.84x) drops the room-T glue requirement 642.7->349.3 meV; Tc by order 10->159->293K (1<2<3 monotone), each lever necessary (ablate 3D->159K, ablate glue->168K). 5/5 PASS. Win is conditional on the levers being independent in a real 3D heterostructure (L2). Room-T at a knife-edge.

title: H_008 The retarded explicit-phonon vertex makes pair-channel <g>_pair EXCEED the single-particle Peotta-Torma value (4.27x) in the anti-adiabatic weak-coupling corner — real sign-free ED reopens the glue crack the static mean-field closed.
verdict: 🟢 REAL-ED → RETARDED VERTEX EXCEEDS STATIC BOUND — sign-free 2e+phonon ED (pool host summer, dim up to 562500): best <g>_pair=0.822 vs single-particle 0.192 (ratio 4.27x) at Omega=8/g=0.6; static-U baseline stays BELOW sp (crack was closed by mean-field, reopened by retarded vertex). Excess is corner-specific (anti-adiabatic Omega>>g); strong-coupling ratio collapses to 0.08-0.78. Glue lever (H_004) is real but corner-confined.

title: H_009 The third material is the connector — a wide-gap/phonon-matched spacer C (hBN-class) opens a fabricable thickness window that is both electron-opaque and phonon-transparent, promoting H_003's interface knob to a real material lever.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CONNECTOR-WINDOW-EXISTS — a wide-gap/phonon-matched spacer (lambda_e=0.5, lambda_ph=5.0 ML) has a fabricable window [0.44, 1.78] ML (width 1.34) that is both electron-opaque (cost<=0.415) AND phonon-transparent (T>=0.70); a non-selective spacer (lambda_e=lambda_ph) has NO window. 4/4 PASS. hBN-class is the candidate. Risk: an electronic glue may not pass an electron-opaque spacer (L2).

title: H_010 TOP-DOWN lever-count scan — more levers means ACHIEVABILITY, not redundancy; 4 is the minimal achievable count (3D crosses the achievable-glue line, connector is structural).
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → MORE LEVERS = ACHIEVABILITY — stripping the full {geo,connector,glue,3D} stack: full-4 glue demand 349meV achievable (sub-eV), drop-3D 643meV UNachievable (3D crosses the line), drop-connector inf/wall (structural). Minimal achievable count = 4; no lever removable. 4/4 PASS. Inverts 'fewer is better': count distributes the ~5x deficit so each lever's demand becomes material-achievable.

title: H_011 The +@ trilayer is self-consistent ONLY for a bosonic (field-coupled) glue — a neutral exciton/plasmon penetrates the electron-opaque connector via its long-range Coulomb field, a fermionic electron-transfer glue is blocked.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → NO CONTRADICTION (conditional on a bosonic glue) — bosonic field-coupled glue (lambda_coulomb=8 >> lambda_e=0.5 ML) opens a window [0.44, 2.85] ML through the electron-opaque spacer (Coulomb penetrates, Forster/Coulomb-drag-like); fermionic transfer glue BLOCKED (no window). 4/4 PASS. Resolves H_009 L2: the whole +@ chain collapses to one requirement — a bosonic, field-coupled, ~349 meV glue without competing order.

title: H_012 A topology/symmetry-protected pairing gap is NOT an orthogonal 5th room-T lever — it buys only pairing amplitude, the room-T stack is phase-stiffness-limited, so it collapses into the H_001 geometry lever.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CLOSED-NEGATIVE (collapse) — topology is a pairing-AMPLITUDE lever; the room-T 4-lever stack is phase-STIFFNESS-limited (BKT band), so a protected gap never relaxes the 349 meV glue demand (even 2000 meV relaxes nothing) and the only stiffness it adds = FS quantum metric = H_001 geometry lever. NOT an orthogonal 5th axis (unlike the real 1.84x 3D lever). 4/5 (F1 FAIL = the intended does-not-relax). fleet lane.

title: H_013 Charge/spin/orbital fractionalization evades the FS two-lever tie at the SECTOR level (geometry in spinon, glue in holon) — but only above an exotic ~800 meV fractionalization gap and only to ~77 K.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → BOX-OPENS-BUT-NEW-BILL — sector-split genuinely evades the single-electron FS tie (a real orthogonal bypass) but the box opens only above Delta_frac~800 meV (critical 459 meV vs recombination) and reaches only ~77 K; the wall is relocated to an exotic deconfinement gap, not removed. 6/6. fleet lane.

title: H_014 The room-T electronic glue drives a competing order (SDW) BEFORE superconductivity — under a toy Stoner/RPA model the +@ architecture fails the competing-order gate (SDW U*=1.0 < SC U*=2.22, no SC-leading window).
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CLOSED-NEGATIVE — toy Stoner/RPA multi-channel: SDW unstable at U*=1.0, SC at U*=2.22 -> SDW diverges FIRST, no SC-leading window; room-T glue (U~0.5-1.0) at/below SDW threshold. The dominant assumed risk is realized: glue drives SDW before SC. 0/5 (all triggered). CONDITIONAL on toy constants (nesting 0.85) -> a measured THREAT escapable by suppressing nesting (L1/L2), not a terminal ceiling. fleet lane.

title: H_016 Frustrating the nesting (eta_nest sweep) lifts H_014's competing-order wall — below eta*~0.45 (plausible for kagome/triangular) SC becomes the leading instability; room-T amplitude axis stays uncleared.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → HONEST-POSITIVE — break-walls continuation of H_014: sweeping frustration eta_nest 0.85->0.10 flips SDW-vs-SC at critical eta*=0.45 (closed-form f_glue/N; grid 0.44), ABOVE the pre-registered plausibility floor 0.30 -> competing order is a REMOVABLE wall (frustrate the host), not robust. 5/5 PASS, deterministic. BUT room-T amplitude uncleared (relaxed room-T U=0.543 < SC threshold 2.22) -> escape buys SC-leading, not room-T magnitude. absorbed=false, GATE_OPEN.

title: H_017 Disorder does NOT give the geometry lever for free — the same disorder that flattens the band to >=2x DOS Anderson-localizes carriers below the Cooper-pair length; flat-and-delocalized window empty.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CLOSED-NEGATIVE — seed O2 (obstacle-as-resource): flat-enough onset needs W_dis>=1.0 (2x DOS) but delocalization fails already at W_dis>0.67, so at the flat onset xi_loc=0.55*xi_0 (localized). flat-AND-delocalized window empty (0/5). Disorder-flatness and pair delocalization mutually exclusive under 2D weak-localization. Escape (untested): 3D mobility edge / BEC-side short pair.

title: H_018 Adversarial held-out check of the central Tc estimator — gets the AVERAGE right (geomean 1.86x) but FAILS per-material SCATTER (1061x spread on 8 held-out anchors); individual Tc / room-T extrapolations carry order-of-magnitude uncertainty.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CLOSED-NEGATIVE — geometric_bkt_tc_band (Tc=0.456*Omega) vs 8 held-out real SCs (tTLG, RTG, CsV3Sb5, MgB2, Pb, YBCO...): geomean 1.86x, bias +0.27dex, 50% within 3x, monotonic (4/5 PASS) BUT F4 scatter FAIL (spread 1061x vs 6.8x in-sample). Fair order-of-magnitude average, NOT a reliable per-material predictor -> room-T Tc numbers carry ~order-of-magnitude uncertainty (read as coordinates). Does NOT affect the wall/closed-negative findings (gates/races, not absolute Tc).

verdict: 🟡 REAL-DFT (PARTIAL POSITIVE) — self-built SERIAL QE7.2 on summer. Cell: experimental monoclinic C2/c (a=3.496 b=12.829 c=15.641A beta=90.53, Sunshine&Ibers 1985 via arXiv:2201.07750; vol 701.5A^3, Ta8Ni4Se20=32, 296 e-, Ta x-shift breaks Cmcm symmetry) -> F4 PASS. BOTH break the Cmcm freeze (H_024 froze byte-identical 13.94569806=13.94569806) with live charge dynamics (no two values identical) -> F1 PASS (descent), F3 PASS (attributed to symmetry breaking). Neither reaches 1e-6 on the SERIAL build (make.inc MPIF90=gfortran no -D__MPI; ldd no MPI lib; 'Serial version'; prior -np 12 = 12 redundant copies) -> F5 PASS (wall disclosed). verdict: 🟡 REAL-DFT — self-built QE7.2 REBUILT WITH MPI on summer (canonical ~/qe_build, in place). (A INFRA, F1+F2 PASS): before = make.inc MPIF90=gfortran DFLAGS=-D__FFTW only, banner 'Serial version', mpirun -np 12 = 12 redundant serial copies (the true tractability wall behind H_015/H_019/H_024/H_025). Root cause = OpenMPI 4.1.6 runtime present but libopenmpi-dev (linkable .so symlinks the mpif90 wrapper references) missing -> ./configure silently 'Configured for serial'. Fix = sudo apt-get install libopenmpi-dev -> ./configure MPIF90=mpif90 --enable-parallel ('Parallel environment detected successfully') -> make clean && make pw -j12 (BUILD_EXIT=0). After (verbatim): make.inc DFLAGS=-D__FFTW -D__MPI; ldd pw.x links libmpi.so.40 + libmpi_mpifh.so.40; banner under mpirun -np 4 = 'Parallel version (MPI), running on 4 processors', under -np 6 = 'running on 6 processors' -> substrate FIXED. (B PHYSICS, F3+F4+F5+F7 PASS): re-ran H_025 monoclinic C2/c cell (Sunshine&Ibers 1985 via arXiv:2201.07750; vol 701.5A^3, Ta8Ni4Se20=32, 296 e-, identical header) via mpirun -np 6 pw.x -npool 2, ~6x faster, ran far past the serial cut-off. Robust-PBE: 17.17->4.90->2.70->0.86->0.468->...->1.638->1.662 Ry (14 iter, ~38x descent then up-trending oscillation). PBE+U(Ni3d=3eV ortho-atomic Dudarev): 17.91->6.15->3.84->1.20->0.639->...->1.191->1.101 Ry (12 iter, ~28x then oscillation). High-smear(degauss0.03 beta0.2 ndim16): 17.15->...->0.963->1.438->...->0.545 Ry (12 iter, same plateau). cluster: spin-fluctuation / phase-stiffness ambient ceiling (T_BKT=(pi/2)D_s) -- within-cluster variant
violated_premise: single-particle-coherent / equilibrium carriers (carriers = preformed real-space pairs / bipolarons, not BCS quasiparticles)
one_line: A charge-Kondo / negative-U skipper (Tl-O/Bi-O) lattice of preformed charge-2e bosons is a genuinely distinct electronic, eV-scale escape: the seed claims T_c is set by the hybridization-resonance width Gamma (no quantum-metric ceiling). But a preformed-pair condensate T_c is the BOSON superfluid stiffness k_B T_c = C*n_B^2/3*t_B (Alexandrov bipolaron-BEC), and the deep binding that makes pairs preformed/unbreakable (binding>>Gamma) forces |U|>>z*t_imp -> HEAVY bipolaron (t_B=z*t_imp^2/|U| second-order-suppressed), while the dilute/charge-order trap caps n_B. Calibrated on BOTH real negative-U skipper SCs (Tl:PbTe 1.5K, K-BaBiO3 30K -- reproduced exactly, no free fit), the best steel-manned condensation T_c=34.8K lands -99.2K below the 134K wall (3.85x deficit), while the seed Gamma/k_B claim over-states by 83x. Honest-null holds: the eV resonance sets the binding, never the condensation; the deepest measured negative-U skipper SC (BaBiO3, 30K) IS the empirical confirmation. Confirms-wall.

name: Zero-Moment Stiffness Ladder (decoupled magnetic-vs-charge phase stiffness)
cluster: spin-fluctuation / phase-stiffness ambient ceiling (T_BKT=(pi/2)D_s) -- within-cluster variant
escape_class: (c) different rigidity -- high CHARGE superfluid stiffness from a metallic compensated altermagnet (zero net moment as a lattice-symmetry property, not carrier starvation)
violated_premise: carrier-scarcity (a metallic compensated altermagnet supplies eV-scale charge Drude weight with no Mott-doping carrier scarcity; zero net moment is a lattice-symmetry property, not carrier starvation)
one_line: A metallic compensated altermagnet (zero net moment = lattice symmetry, NOT Mott-doping carrier scarcity) supplies eV-scale charge Drude weight (1436 meV) to attack the cuprate wall's doped-Mott-scarcity root; but the T_BKT-setting quantity is the gap-bounded SUPERFLUID weight D_s^sf=min(Drude, K*Delta)*P_pair, and the altermagnetic gap Delta is SOURCED BY and DEPAIRED BY the same spin splitting J (the nodal-spin-splitter vertex IS the glue, Delta=0.3*J; J also Chandrasekhar-Clogston pair-breaks). Over the REAL sourced host menu n and pairing-survival anti-correlate through that single J: CrSb (metal, J~1eV>>Delta -> P_pair=0, depaired), RuO2 (nonmagnetic per muSR/Mossbauer/neutron, J~0 -> Delta=3 meV gap-caps the 742 meV Drude to 2.3 meV), MnTe (1.3 eV-gap semiconductor, n~1e20 -> D_s^charge=2.8 meV), doped semimetal (P_pair=0). Best real host D_s^sf=2.33 meV -> T_BKT=42.5 K, 91 K short of 134 K. The only escape is a FICTIONAL goldilocks host requiring an unmeasured 30 meV altermagnetic gap = the separate un-demonstrated room-T-glue claim (H_032-035 wall), correctly excluded from the decisive null. Positive control F3 (uncapped Drude clears wall) triggers by design, proving the wall is held by the gap-cap+depairing not carrier scarcity. Honest-null NOT triggered -> confirms-wall. Same no-free-lunch: remove carrier scarcity -> bottleneck relocates to the gap-bounded superfluid weight.

violated_premise: order-amplitude/equilibrium thermal robustness (a static spin-group-symmetry texture claimed to keep the SF vertex amplitude alive as <S>(T) melts, vs a Goldstone magnon)
one_line: The anisotropy/spin-group-symmetry lock is REAL but it picks the angular pairing channel, not the thermal amplitude-law: a finite-T mean-field probe runs an altermagnet d-wave (<g^2>=0.278) and an AFM-magnon control (<g^2>=0.015) vertex on ONE lattice, both riding the SAME shared spin-correlation amplitude Camp(T)~<S>^2(T) (Weiss/Brillouin order + bounded OZ tail). The normalized lambda(T)/lambda(0) curves are IDENTICAL to machine precision (max diff 2.2e-16), so both have T50=0.808 and the thermal-robustness margin T50_AM-T50_AFM is +0.0000 vs the +0.30 the seed needs. The symmetry changes which-channel (form factor), never how-much-glue-survives-heating (amplitude). Honest-null F1 TRIGGERED. Thermal-axis within-cluster variant of H_040; lit-grounded (arXiv:2505.12342 short-range-fluctuation-mediated altermagnet d-wave pairing; arXiv:2509.09959, 2510.19083 V~U^2 chi RPA; Dahm Nat.Phys.5,217(2009) lambda_SF tracks chi(T)). Confirms the wall.

name: AB-Cage Breather (flux-detuned Aharonov-Bohm caging that lifts the cage)
cluster: spin-fluctuation / phase-stiffness ambient ceiling (T_BKT=(pi/2)D_s) -- within-cluster flux-/interference-decoupled flat-band variant
escape_class: (c) different rigidity -- a flux-origin (not band-touching) flat band whose cage gap is set by hopping t (O(eV)), claimed to add |U|-INDEPENDENT velocity stiffness and break the D_s ~ |U|*<g> coupling
violated_premise: single-particle-flattening ORIGIN (the freeze's geometric-stiffness ceiling was measured on band-touching / quantum-metric flat bands; this probe instead flattens the band by an Aharonov-Bohm flux phi=pi, an interference-phase cage, not an avoided crossing)
one_line: Flux-detuning an Aharonov-Bohm caged diamond chain (phi=pi-delta) to buy |U|-INDEPENDENT velocity stiffness, hoping the cage gap (set by eV hopping t, not an avoided crossing) lets |U| stay O(eV) while detuning breaks the D_s ~ |U|*<g> coupling: the exact diamond-chain spectrum E_pm=+/-2t sqrt(1+cos k * sin(delta/2)) (Vidal-Mosseri-Doucot) plus the freeze's operative local-pair stiffness D_s=c*z*t_pair*n(1-n), t_pair=t_eff^2/|U|, show the opposite, parameter-free: (i) at the perfect cage delta=0 D_s=0 EXACTLY (the AB cage localizes the PAIRS too -- no free geometric baseline to lift); (ii) detuning grows velocity but D_s(delta) peaks at the pair-unbinding edge W1~|U| with D_s_peak/|U|=0.0111 CONSTANT across an 8x |U| range and INDEPENDENT of t -- the velocity stiffness is PINNED to the interaction scale, NOT decoupled; (iii) at a physical |U|=0.5 eV the best T_BKT=101.6 K, -32 K short of the 134 K wall, independently REPRODUCING the H_038 local-pair anchor (~90 K). Clearing the wall needs an unphysical |U|>=661 meV (room-T: >=1.45 eV). Decisive honest-null (stiffness decoupled from |U|) NOT triggered; all 4 falsifiers pass (4/4). Same no-free-lunch: lift the cage to free the pairs -> the eV binding that made the cage useful unbinds them; keep the cage -> pairs trapped at D_s=0. Confirms-wall via a new flat-band ORIGIN.

name: CLS-Phonon Hybrid Glue (Friedrich-Wintgen BIC reservoir)
cluster: spin-fluctuation / phase-stiffness ambient ceiling (T_BKT=(pi/2)D_s) -- within-cluster variant
escape_class: (a) borrow stiffness from a co-located dispersive reservoir while pairing stays on a flat BIC branch (interference-decoupled flat band)
violated_premise: single-particle-flattened / clean band (a Friedrich-Wintgen BIC co-locates a flat pairing branch and a dispersive stiffness branch at the SAME energy by destructive interference)
one_line: A Friedrich-Wintgen BIC co-locating a flat (pairing, high-DOS) branch and a dispersive continuum (bandwidth W_cont) at the SAME energy is the seed escape (pairs on the flat branch, coherence rides the continuum), but a FW BIC is BY DEFINITION the supermode whose net coupling to the continuum channel is identically zero (destructive-interference cancellation; Soljacic Nat.Rev.Mat. 1 16048 (2016), Friedrich-Wintgen PRA 32 3231 (1985)). The transport overlap that would carry the continuum bandwidth-derived stiffness IS that nullified channel coupling: in a two-resonance/one-channel model the BIC->continuum overlap O=0.000 EXACTLY for ALL W_cont 0->1600 meV, so D_s growth = 0 and T_BKT stays pinned at the 164 K flat-branch ceiling. No-free-lunch witness: continuum stiffness donation is purchasable only by detuning off the BIC condition, which makes the state a leaky/decaying resonance (still_BIC=False) and forfeits the flat-branch DOS advantage. 5/5 falsifiers not triggered -> confirms-wall.

name: Interference-Protected Pair BICs (two-particle bound state in the continuum)
cluster: spin-fluctuation / phase-stiffness ambient ceiling (T_BKT=(pi/2)D_s) -- within-cluster flat-band variant
escape_class: (a) split levers by sector -- flatten the PAIR (two-body) band via a two-particle BIC while single particles stay dispersive, so pairing and stiffness live in different sectors
violated_premise: single-particle-flattened (the freeze's geometric-stiffness ceiling was measured on single-particle-flat hosts; this probe instead flattens the TWO-particle pair band via a BIC and keeps single particles dispersive)
one_line: Flattening the TWO-particle (pair) band via a bound-state-in-the-continuum while single particles stay dispersive, hoping D_s keeps the eV single-particle bandwidth W_1 while pairing rides a meV flat pair sector: an EXACT two-particle ED (full opposite-spin Hilbert space, dim 64) on a cross-stitch flat-band ring with twisted-boundary pair-COM dispersion measures the dressed pair-band width W_2 = 0.140*W_1 at the deepest BIC -- the pair (stiffness) band is a small fraction of the single-particle bandwidth, and it COLLAPSES as the binding deepens (W_2: 0.70->0.37->0.28 as |U|: 3->6->12, ~13x t^2/|U|). The same |U| that binds the pair immobilizes it (heavy Cooper-pair mass m*~1/(U g), Peotta-Torma Nat.Commun. 6 8944 2015; D_s set by the single-particle minimal quantum metric, arXiv:2203.11133, NOT a free pair-band sector). Pairing and stiffness do NOT decouple into independent sectors: no free lunch. All 4 falsifiers triggered (0/4 pass); the decisive honest-null (D_s collapses to the flat-pair-band scale) FAILS. Confirms the wall in the two-particle-BIC / flat-band channel.

name: PDW Commensurate Lock: pair-density-wave pinned to the lattice
cluster: finite-Q / order-traps (sibling of H_042 FFLO, H_043 vortex-code) -- within-cluster variant
escape_class: (b) order-traps clause -- commensurate phason pinning (violates the Q=0 premise from momentum space)
violated_premise: Q=0 (commensurate Q=G/n PDW whose sliding phason Goldstone is gapped by a lattice-commensurate Umklapp V_p*cos(n*theta), attacking the order-traps clause from momentum space)
one_line: Pinning a commensurate PDW phason to the lattice (V_p*cos(n*theta) Umklapp) to convert the soft sliding Goldstone into a gapped phason with Delta_phason~sqrt(V_p*rho_s)>164 K while pairing stays intact: but the commensurability/lock-in energy that opens the gap is a HIGH-ORDER Umklapp V_p~W*(Delta0/W)^n (Lee-Rice-Anderson 1974; McMillan PRB 12 1187 1975 / Nakanishi-Shiba), so even at the most favorable n=2 and a charitable rho_s anchored to the 164 K band-top the gap is only 17.8 K -- an order of magnitude below the 134-164 K ceiling and ~16x below 293 K -- and the SAME strong-pinning Umklapp depairs the finite-Q channel via +Q/-Q mixing (lambda/lam0=0.9917<1). Big phason gap and intact finite-Q pairing are mutually exclusive: no free lunch. Both decisive honest-null prongs triggered; 1/5 falsifiers pass. Confirms the wall in the commensurate-pinning / order-traps channel.

name: Pinning-Memory Ratchet (Glassy-Phason Non-Equilibrium Stiffness Ballast)
cluster: spin-fluctuation / phase-stiffness ambient ceiling (T_BKT=(pi/2)rho_s; Emery-Kivelson) -- within-cluster variant
escape_class: (a) borrow stiffness from a non-electronic reservoir -- a PINNED STRUCTURAL GLASS (overdamped-phason / TLS bath) added to the phase action as a memory kernel chi_glass(omega)(dtau theta)^2, no Leggett mode to the SC condensate (H_032 quantum-metric/Leggett cap does not apply)
violated_premise: non-electronic / non-quasiparticle stiffness reservoir (a pinned structural glass donating phase rigidity via a memory kernel) -- but the kernel is TEMPORAL (compressibility) and slow, the two premises that decouple it from the BKT spatial-stiffness vortex-unbinding scale
one_line: Borrow phase stiffness from a PINNED STRUCTURAL GLASS (overdamped-phason/TLS bath, kernel chi_glass(w)=sum_i w_i*G_i/(w^2+G_i^2), Jiang-Zaccone-Setty-Baggioli PRB 108 054203 (2023)=arXiv:2305.05407) added to the phase action -- distinct from H_032's electronic donation (no Leggett mode to a glass). Two decisive honest-nulls both TRIGGER: (N1 frequency-mismatch, the seed's own null) the glass is slow (Gamma_i<<omega_J=10 meV), so at the Josephson/vortex frequency that unbinds a vortex only chi_glass(omega_J)/chi_glass(0)=9.99e-7 of the static weight survives -> the adiabatic bath is decoupled from the fast phase winding; (N2 wrong-channel, even stronger) chi_glass multiplies (dtau theta)^2, a TEMPORAL (compressibility) term, and Nelson-Kosterlitz T_BKT=(pi/2)J depends on the SPATIAL stiffness only, so d T_BKT/d chi_glass=0 exactly for ALL w_i,Gamma_i -> honest T_BKT=164.00 K unchanged (the naive static-add the escape needs would give an absurd 6.4e5 K). The same paper's real result is that the glass can dress a phason-PAIRING vertex (non-monotonic Eliashberg T_c), but that is the glue axis (H_032/H_041 manifold), not the BKT-stiffness lever this card falsifies. No free lunch: a glass rigid enough to add static weight is too slow and in the wrong channel. 2/5 falsifiers pass; confirms the wall.

one_line: Manufacturing the geometry lever from on-site Anderson disorder 'for free from randomness' -- a disorder-INDUCED DOS-spike flat band at E_F without crystallinity -- hoping a finite W* gives T_BKT>134K with extended pairs: a deterministic stdlib-only Anderson tight-binding probe (exact tridiagonal diagonalization for DOS+IPR on N=600, transfer-matrix Lyapunov xi_loc on N=20000, Kubo coherence-suppressed stiffness proxy) sweeps W=0..8t and finds the opposite. On-site box disorder manufactures essentially NO excess flat-band weight (DOS spike ratio peaks at only 1.026 -- it broadens the band, it does not pile a degenerate flat band at E_F), so the most-generous FS-capped bare stiffness is only D_s~0.19 meV (T_BKT=3.55K, 38x below the 7.4 meV cuprate scale); and the only W with any excess (W/t~1) is weak-disorder with no real flat band, while pushing W to where DOS would concentrate (W/t>=4) drives xi_loc->a and IPR up (Anderson localization, scaling theory PRL 42 673 1979) so the coherence factor kills D_s->0 (Kohn PR 133 A171 1964; Kolar-Heikkila-Torma arXiv:2510.05224 disorder superfluid weight 'typically vanishing'). Decisive honest-null F_NULL TRIGGERS (1/5 pass). Same no-free-lunch: the randomness that flattens the band is the randomness that localizes the carriers -- manufactured geometry carries zero phase coherence. Confirms the wall via a new (disorder-induced) flat-band ORIGIN. is_green=false, absorbed=false.

name: Chern-Simons Stiffness Pump (anyon statistical rigidity)
cluster: spin-fluctuation / phase-stiffness ambient ceiling (T_BKT=(pi/2)D_s) -- within-cluster variant
escape_class: (c) different rigidity (glue-free statistical-gauge-field stiffness)

one_line: A doped-FQAH Chern-Simons stiffness pump is a genuinely glue-free phase-rigidity source (composite fermions + statistical gauge field, outside the 5 boson families and H_032-043), and anyon superconductivity is REAL -- but the actual literature stiffness (Nosov-Han-Khalaf arXiv:2506.02108) is D_s = kappa = omega_c/(3 pi) with omega_c = pi*delta/m*, and in a flat Chern band 1/m* is interaction-set, so D_s collapses EXACTLY onto the Uemura/boson line D_s ~ U*delta(1-delta), SUPPRESSED by 1/(3 pi). At a generous FQAH ceiling U=30 meV and optimal (delta,k), best D_s = 0.796 meV -> T_BKT ~ 14.5 K, a 9.24x deficit and -119.5 K short of the 134 K wall. Honest-null holds: statistics shifts the prefactor, never the interaction-set scale. Confirms the wall (13/13 within-cluster).

Confirms the wall.

name: Infinite-T Memory Graft (subsystem-code symmetry that does not melt)
cluster: code-/symmetry-protected order-class (subsystem-code charge with no finite melting T by theorem)
escape_class: (b) attack the equilibrium energetic-melting order-trap premise via a subsystem-conserved order sector (not the stiffness)

one_line: A Z2xZ2 plaquette/Xu-Moore subsystem code DOES host a conserved 'no-melt' logical charge (exact 4-site ED: ||[S,H_code]||=0 for all four row/col generators, logical autocorrelation plateau=1.000 at every T up to infinite T) -- BUT the charge-2e pair-hopping graft that makes it a superconductor is a sigma^x/sigma^y bilinear that ANTICOMMUTES with the sigma^z line generators (||[S,H_SC]||=400 meV exact), destroying the protecting charge for any finite coupling (You-Devakul-Burnell-Sondhi arXiv:1803.02369). Once protection is gone the order is energetic, bounded by (pi/2)D_s=1.1-8.0 K for the frozen flat-band D_s -- 16.7x and ~126 K short of the 134-164 K wall (the identical deficit as H_043). No-free-lunch lock: commuting=>not an SC, SC=>not commuting. CRUX honest-null triggered -> confirms-wall.

name: Overhauser-Locked Phase Ballast (nuclear-spin co-condensate)
escape_class: (c) different rigidity (parallel non-electronic reservoir)

violated_premise: rigidity-source (parallel two-stiffness rho_s=rho_el+lambda^2*rho_nuc from a nuclear-spin bath, not the electronic Q=0 superfluid weight)
one_line: A coherent Overhauser/nuclear-spin bath as a SECOND parallel phase-rigidity reservoir (rho_s=rho_el+lambda^2*rho_nuc) -- the genuinely non-electronic donation twist H_032/H_041 never tested. Both factors in the ballast term compound to ~zero by independent grounded physics: (N-a) contact-hyperfine lambda=A_hf/W~1e-8..1e-6 so lambda^2<=1e-12 (Slichter; 51V s-d cancellation), and (N-b) nuclear-spin RKKY ordering at nK..mK (Cu 58nK, Ag 560pK -- Oja-Lounasmaa RMP 69,1 1997; enhanced 2DEG ~mK -- Simon-Loss arXiv:0709.0164) so rho_nuc/rho_el<=1e-5. Net ballast/rho_el~2e-18; T_BKT lift <femtoK; isotope contrast (spin-I vs spin-0) ~4e-16 K vs the >=1 K needed. Even an absurd rho_nuc=1000K overshoot lifts T_BKT by ~4e-10 K because lambda^2 alone caps it. No free lunch: the donor either decouples (small lambda) or has no ambient rigidity (nK ordering) -- here both. tc pinned at 164K. Confirms the wall.

name: Hyperbolic Pitch-Black Coulomb (Anisotropic Negative-Group-Velocity Glue)
escape_class: (b) different glue

one_line: The hyperbolic-cladding twist (eps_par=2, eps_perp=-3) genuinely DOES open a momentum-selective attractive Coulomb cone that the isotropic ENZ sibling H_039 lacked -- the BARE cone covers 56% of the FS shell [kF,2kF] inside 2kF (F1 PASS, F4 excess +0.079 vs isotropic 0%). But the decisive honest-null N1 holds: the metal's OWN positive 2D Thomas-Fermi screening (q_TF/2kF=2.39) dominates the modest eps-tensor cone across the whole shell, collapsing the SCREENED attractive coverage to 7.9% << 50% (F2 TRIGGER). The empty-medium cone fills with positive intra-layer screening exactly where it would help, and an external static dielectric donates 0 meV of phase stiffness (changes none of n, m*, d) -- consistent with the measured Al 1.2K->3.9K hyperbolic-metamaterial bump being a mu*-renorm of an existing phonon SC (Smolyaninov Sci.Rep.6,34140). Distinct twist, same wall. Confirms-wall.

name: Flexoelectric Gradient Glue (pairing from strain-gradient, not strain)
cluster: dielectric-engineering glue family (within-cluster variant of H_039 ENZ)
escape_class: (b) different glue
violated_freeze_premise: glue-momentum/glue-source (finite-q ~q flexoelectric gradient vertex from a soft-TO susceptibility, not a q~0 retarded boson, at metallic n)
one_line: A flexoelectric finite-q pairing vertex V(q)=(q*mu)^2*chi_soft (vanishing at q=0, the inverse of every q~0 glue) DOES pair in the dilute FE-QCP regime (F1 PASS, the published ultralow-density TO-mode SC, Kozii-Bi-Ruhman PRX 9 031046) but the two suppressions are inescapable together: the (q)^2 form factor wants large-q while chi_soft peaks at small-q, and at metallic n the soft TO mode is Landau-overdamped (gamma_LD~N0/q, coherent-pole weight Z->0) so chi_soft collapses (ratio 0.16). Leading gap eigenvalue peaks at only lambda=0.147 at n=1e14 (D_s=1.59 meV, sub-cuprate) and MONOTONICALLY collapses to <0.01 at genuinely metallic D_s>7.4 meV densities; NO single density has both lambda>0.3 AND D_s>7.4 meV. The glue dies exactly where the stiffness lives (Saha et al. arXiv:2412.05374: overdamped at QCP, gradient pairing only valid at lowest densities). All three decisive nulls trigger -> confirms-wall.

name: Frustrated Valence Skipper: the disproportionation that can't crystallize
cluster: negative-U / valence-skipper (order-trap removal, CHARGE channel)
escape_class: (d) order-trap removal via geometric frustration (charge channel)
violated_premise: crystalline / equilibrium-ordered (frustrate the competing charge-CDW so eV pairing survives un-trapped)
one_line: Geometric frustration of a negative-U valence skipper to kill the charge-CDW trap and free the eV pairing scale: a real 16-state Fock-space ED of the negative-U extended-Hubbard dimer measures the Shiba pseudospin SU(2) duality spectrum(U<0)=-spectrum(U>0) to 3.1e-15, proving the CDW and s-wave SC channels are TWO ARMS OF ONE CONSERVED instability. Frustration ROTATES the CDW<->SC pseudospin vector (CDW gap granted ->0) but cannot LENGTHEN it, so what it frees is the eV BINDING (|U|nu(1-nu)=187 meV), NOT phase STIFFNESS -- and the stiffness projection stays pinned on the conserved cuprate D_s=7.4 meV line (T_BKT~135 K, bottom of the 134-164 K band; mis-reading binding as stiffness would give a forbidden 3418 K). Worse, frustration substitutes a charge-cluster GLASS that re-localizes the pairs (arXiv:1311.0344). Both decisive honest-null branches triggered; the trap is conserved against the glue. Confirms the wall in the charge-order channel.

name: Charge-Kondo / Pair-Resonance Lattice (a negative-U impurity band of preformed pairs)
escape_class: (c) different rigidity (electronic eV-scale charge-2e pair resonance, claimed glue-free / no quantum-metric ceiling)
cluster: spin-fluctuation / phase-stiffness ambient ceiling (T_BKT=(pi/2)D_s) -- within-cluster variant
violated_premise: single-particle-coherent / equilibrium carriers (carriers = preformed real-space pairs / bipolarons, not BCS quasiparticles)
one_line: A charge-Kondo / negative-U skipper (Tl-O/Bi-O) lattice of preformed charge-2e bosons is a genuinely distinct electronic, eV-scale escape: the seed claims T_c is set by the hybridization-resonance width Gamma (no quantum-metric ceiling). But a preformed-pair condensate T_c is the BOSON superfluid stiffness k_B T_c = C*n_B^2/3*t_B (Alexandrov bipolaron-BEC), and the deep binding that makes pairs preformed/unbreakable (binding>>Gamma) forces |U|>>z*t_imp -> HEAVY bipolaron (t_B=z*t_imp^2/|U| second-order-suppressed), while the dilute/charge-order trap caps n_B. Calibrated on BOTH real negative-U skipper SCs (Tl:PbTe 1.5K, K-BaBiO3 30K -- reproduced exactly, no free fit), the best steel-manned condensation T_c=34.8K lands -99.2K below the 134K wall (3.85x deficit), while the seed Gamma/k_B claim over-states by 83x. Honest-null holds: the eV resonance sets the binding, never the condensation; the deepest measured negative-U skipper SC (BaBiO3, 30K) IS the empirical confirmation. Confirms-wall.

name: Zero-Moment Stiffness Ladder (decoupled magnetic-vs-charge phase stiffness)
cluster: spin-fluctuation / phase-stiffness ambient ceiling (T_BKT=(pi/2)D_s) -- within-cluster variant
escape_class: (c) different rigidity -- high CHARGE superfluid stiffness from a metallic compensated altermagnet (zero net moment as a lattice-symmetry property, not carrier starvation)
violated_premise: carrier-scarcity (a metallic compensated altermagnet supplies eV-scale charge Drude weight with no Mott-doping carrier scarcity; zero net moment is a lattice-symmetry property, not carrier starvation)
one_line: A metallic compensated altermagnet (zero net moment = lattice symmetry, NOT Mott-doping carrier scarcity) supplies eV-scale charge Drude weight (1436 meV) to attack the cuprate wall's doped-Mott-scarcity root; but the T_BKT-setting quantity is the gap-bounded SUPERFLUID weight D_s^sf=min(Drude, K*Delta)*P_pair, and the altermagnetic gap Delta is SOURCED BY and DEPAIRED BY the same spin splitting J (the nodal-spin-splitter vertex IS the glue, Delta=0.3*J; J also Chandrasekhar-Clogston pair-breaks). Over the REAL sourced host menu n and pairing-survival anti-correlate through that single J: CrSb (metal, J~1eV>>Delta -> P_pair=0, depaired), RuO2 (nonmagnetic per muSR/Mossbauer/neutron, J~0 -> Delta=3 meV gap-caps the 742 meV Drude to 2.3 meV), MnTe (1.3 eV-gap semiconductor, n~1e20 -> D_s^charge=2.8 meV), doped semimetal (P_pair=0). Best real host D_s^sf=2.33 meV -> T_BKT=42.5 K, 91 K short of 134 K. The only escape is a FICTIONAL goldilocks host requiring an unmeasured 30 meV altermagnetic gap = the separate un-demonstrated room-T-glue claim (H_032-035 wall), correctly excluded from the decisive null. Positive control F3 (uncapped Drude clears wall) triggers by design, proving the wall is held by the gap-cap+depairing not carrier scarcity. Honest-null NOT triggered -> confirms-wall. Same no-free-lunch: remove carrier scarcity -> bottleneck relocates to the gap-bounded superfluid weight.

name: Anisotropy-Locked Glue (crystal-symmetry-protected pairing immune to order melting)
cluster: spin-group-symmetry pairing decoupled from ORDER AMPLITUDE (thermal-axis within-cluster variant of H_040 nodal-spin-splitter; H_033/H_034 magnon closures)
escape_class: (b) different glue -- spin-group-symmetry vertex claimed to degrade with moment amplitude SLOWER than a Goldstone magnon (thermal-robustness axis)
violated_premise: order-amplitude/equilibrium thermal robustness (a static spin-group-symmetry texture claimed to keep the SF vertex amplitude alive as <S>(T) melts, vs a Goldstone magnon)
one_line: The anisotropy/spin-group-symmetry lock is REAL but it picks the angular pairing channel, not the thermal amplitude-law: a finite-T mean-field probe runs an altermagnet d-wave (<g^2>=0.278) and an AFM-magnon control (<g^2>=0.015) vertex on ONE lattice, both riding the SAME shared spin-correlation amplitude Camp(T)~<S>^2(T) (Weiss/Brillouin order + bounded OZ tail). The normalized lambda(T)/lambda(0) curves are IDENTICAL to machine precision (max diff 2.2e-16), so both have T50=0.808 and the thermal-robustness margin T50_AM-T50_AFM is +0.0000 vs the +0.30 the seed needs. The symmetry changes which-channel (form factor), never how-much-glue-survives-heating (amplitude). Honest-null F1 TRIGGERED. Thermal-axis within-cluster variant of H_040; lit-grounded (arXiv:2505.12342 short-range-fluctuation-mediated altermagnet d-wave pairing; arXiv:2509.09959, 2510.19083 V~U^2 chi RPA; Dahm Nat.Phys.5,217(2009) lambda_SF tracks chi(T)). Confirms the wall.

name: AB-Cage Breather (flux-detuned Aharonov-Bohm caging that lifts the cage)
cluster: spin-fluctuation / phase-stiffness ambient ceiling (T_BKT=(pi/2)D_s) -- within-cluster flux-/interference-decoupled flat-band variant
escape_class: (c) different rigidity -- a flux-origin (not band-touching) flat band whose cage gap is set by hopping t (O(eV)), claimed to add |U|-INDEPENDENT velocity stiffness and break the D_s ~ |U|*<g> coupling
violated_premise: single-particle-flattening ORIGIN (the freeze's geometric-stiffness ceiling was measured on band-touching / quantum-metric flat bands; this probe instead flattens the band by an Aharonov-Bohm flux phi=pi, an interference-phase cage, not an avoided crossing)
one_line: Flux-detuning an Aharonov-Bohm caged diamond chain (phi=pi-delta) to buy |U|-INDEPENDENT velocity stiffness, hoping the cage gap (set by eV hopping t, not an avoided crossing) lets |U| stay O(eV) while detuning breaks the D_s ~ |U|*<g> coupling: the exact diamond-chain spectrum E_pm=+/-2t sqrt(1+cos k * sin(delta/2)) (Vidal-Mosseri-Doucot) plus the freeze's operative local-pair stiffness D_s=c*z*t_pair*n(1-n), t_pair=t_eff^2/|U|, show the opposite, parameter-free: (i) at the perfect cage delta=0 D_s=0 EXACTLY (the AB cage localizes the PAIRS too -- no free geometric baseline to lift); (ii) detuning grows velocity but D_s(delta) peaks at the pair-unbinding edge W1~|U| with D_s_peak/|U|=0.0111 CONSTANT across an 8x |U| range and INDEPENDENT of t -- the velocity stiffness is PINNED to the interaction scale, NOT decoupled; (iii) at a physical |U|=0.5 eV the best T_BKT=101.6 K, -32 K short of the 134 K wall, independently REPRODUCING the H_038 local-pair anchor (~90 K). Clearing the wall needs an unphysical |U|>=661 meV (room-T: >=1.45 eV). Decisive honest-null (stiffness decoupled from |U|) NOT triggered; all 4 falsifiers pass (4/4). Same no-free-lunch: lift the cage to free the pairs -> the eV binding that made the cage useful unbinds them; keep the cage -> pairs trapped at D_s=0. Confirms-wall via a new flat-band ORIGIN.

name: CLS-Phonon Hybrid Glue (Friedrich-Wintgen BIC reservoir)
cluster: spin-fluctuation / phase-stiffness ambient ceiling (T_BKT=(pi/2)D_s) -- within-cluster variant
escape_class: (a) borrow stiffness from a co-located dispersive reservoir while pairing stays on a flat BIC branch (interference-decoupled flat band)
violated_premise: single-particle-flattened / clean band (a Friedrich-Wintgen BIC co-locates a flat pairing branch and a dispersive stiffness branch at the SAME energy by destructive interference)
one_line: A Friedrich-Wintgen BIC co-locating a flat (pairing, high-DOS) branch and a dispersive continuum (bandwidth W_cont) at the SAME energy is the seed escape (pairs on the flat branch, coherence rides the continuum), but a FW BIC is BY DEFINITION the supermode whose net coupling to the continuum channel is identically zero (destructive-interference cancellation; Soljacic Nat.Rev.Mat. 1 16048 (2016), Friedrich-Wintgen PRA 32 3231 (1985)). The transport overlap that would carry the continuum bandwidth-derived stiffness IS that nullified channel coupling: in a two-resonance/one-channel model the BIC->continuum overlap O=0.000 EXACTLY for ALL W_cont 0->1600 meV, so D_s growth = 0 and T_BKT stays pinned at the 164 K flat-branch ceiling. No-free-lunch witness: continuum stiffness donation is purchasable only by detuning off the BIC condition, which makes the state a leaky/decaying resonance (still_BIC=False) and forfeits the flat-branch DOS advantage. 5/5 falsifiers not triggered -> confirms-wall.

name: Interference-Protected Pair BICs (two-particle bound state in the continuum)
cluster: spin-fluctuation / phase-stiffness ambient ceiling (T_BKT=(pi/2)D_s) -- within-cluster flat-band variant
escape_class: (a) split levers by sector -- flatten the PAIR (two-body) band via a two-particle BIC while single particles stay dispersive, so pairing and stiffness live in different sectors
violated_premise: single-particle-flattened (the freeze's geometric-stiffness ceiling was measured on single-particle-flat hosts; this probe instead flattens the TWO-particle pair band via a BIC and keeps single particles dispersive)
one_line: Flattening the TWO-particle (pair) band via a bound-state-in-the-continuum while single particles stay dispersive, hoping D_s keeps the eV single-particle bandwidth W_1 while pairing rides a meV flat pair sector: an EXACT two-particle ED (full opposite-spin Hilbert space, dim 64) on a cross-stitch flat-band ring with twisted-boundary pair-COM dispersion measures the dressed pair-band width W_2 = 0.140*W_1 at the deepest BIC -- the pair (stiffness) band is a small fraction of the single-particle bandwidth, and it COLLAPSES as the binding deepens (W_2: 0.70->0.37->0.28 as |U|: 3->6->12, ~13x t^2/|U|). The same |U| that binds the pair immobilizes it (heavy Cooper-pair mass m*~1/(U g), Peotta-Torma Nat.Commun. 6 8944 2015; D_s set by the single-particle minimal quantum metric, arXiv:2203.11133, NOT a free pair-band sector). Pairing and stiffness do NOT decouple into independent sectors: no free lunch. All 4 falsifiers triggered (0/4 pass); the decisive honest-null (D_s collapses to the flat-pair-band scale) FAILS. Confirms the wall in the two-particle-BIC / flat-band channel.

name: PDW Commensurate Lock: pair-density-wave pinned to the lattice
cluster: finite-Q / order-traps (sibling of H_042 FFLO, H_043 vortex-code) -- within-cluster variant
escape_class: (b) order-traps clause -- commensurate phason pinning (violates the Q=0 premise from momentum space)
violated_premise: Q=0 (commensurate Q=G/n PDW whose sliding phason Goldstone is gapped by a lattice-commensurate Umklapp V_p*cos(n*theta), attacking the order-traps clause from momentum space)
one_line: Pinning a commensurate PDW phason to the lattice (V_p*cos(n*theta) Umklapp) to convert the soft sliding Goldstone into a gapped phason with Delta_phason~sqrt(V_p*rho_s)>164 K while pairing stays intact: but the commensurability/lock-in energy that opens the gap is a HIGH-ORDER Umklapp V_p~W*(Delta0/W)^n (Lee-Rice-Anderson 1974; McMillan PRB 12 1187 1975 / Nakanishi-Shiba), so even at the most favorable n=2 and a charitable rho_s anchored to the 164 K band-top the gap is only 17.8 K -- an order of magnitude below the 134-164 K ceiling and ~16x below 293 K -- and the SAME strong-pinning Umklapp depairs the finite-Q channel via +Q/-Q mixing (lambda/lam0=0.9917<1). Big phason gap and intact finite-Q pairing are mutually exclusive: no free lunch. Both decisive honest-null prongs triggered; 1/5 falsifiers pass. Confirms the wall in the commensurate-pinning / order-traps channel.

name: Pinning-Memory Ratchet (Glassy-Phason Non-Equilibrium Stiffness Ballast)
cluster: spin-fluctuation / phase-stiffness ambient ceiling (T_BKT=(pi/2)rho_s; Emery-Kivelson) -- within-cluster variant
escape_class: (a) borrow stiffness from a non-electronic reservoir -- a PINNED STRUCTURAL GLASS (overdamped-phason / TLS bath) added to the phase action as a memory kernel chi_glass(omega)(dtau theta)^2, no Leggett mode to the SC condensate (H_032 quantum-metric/Leggett cap does not apply)
violated_premise: non-electronic / non-quasiparticle stiffness reservoir (a pinned structural glass donating phase rigidity via a memory kernel) -- but the kernel is TEMPORAL (compressibility) and slow, the two premises that decouple it from the BKT spatial-stiffness vortex-unbinding scale
one_line: Borrow phase stiffness from a PINNED STRUCTURAL GLASS (overdamped-phason/TLS bath, kernel chi_glass(w)=sum_i w_i*G_i/(w^2+G_i^2), Jiang-Zaccone-Setty-Baggioli PRB 108 054203 (2023)=arXiv:2305.05407) added to the phase action -- distinct from H_032's electronic donation (no Leggett mode to a glass). Two decisive honest-nulls both TRIGGER: (N1 frequency-mismatch, the seed's own null) the glass is slow (Gamma_i<<omega_J=10 meV), so at the Josephson/vortex frequency that unbinds a vortex only chi_glass(omega_J)/chi_glass(0)=9.99e-7 of the static weight survives -> the adiabatic bath is decoupled from the fast phase winding; (N2 wrong-channel, even stronger) chi_glass multiplies (dtau theta)^2, a TEMPORAL (compressibility) term, and Nelson-Kosterlitz T_BKT=(pi/2)J depends on the SPATIAL stiffness only, so d T_BKT/d chi_glass=0 exactly for ALL w_i,Gamma_i -> honest T_BKT=164.00 K unchanged (the naive static-add the escape needs would give an absurd 6.4e5 K). The same paper's real result is that the glass can dress a phason-PAIRING vertex (non-monotonic Eliashberg T_c), but that is the glue axis (H_032/H_041 manifold), not the BKT-stiffness lever this card falsifies. No free lunch: a glass rigid enough to add static weight is too slow and in the wrong channel. 2/5 falsifiers pass; confirms the wall.

name: O2 Disorder -> Flat Band (disorder-induced flat band as a free geometry lever)
cluster: spin-fluctuation / phase-stiffness ambient ceiling (T_BKT=(pi/2)D_s) -- within-cluster flat-band-ORIGIN variant (disorder-induced, not crystalline)
escape_class: (c) different rigidity -- manufacture the geometry lever (tr g) from Anderson on-site disorder 'for free from randomness', a DOS-spike flat band at E_F without crystallinity / destructive-interference design
violated_premise: crystallinity / flat-band-ORIGIN (the freeze measured crystalline quantum-metric flat bands; this probe instead tries to MANUFACTURE the geometry lever from on-site Anderson randomness -- a disorder-induced DOS spike at E_F with no destructive-interference design)
one_line: Manufacturing the geometry lever from on-site Anderson disorder 'for free from randomness' -- a disorder-INDUCED DOS-spike flat band at E_F without crystallinity -- hoping a finite W* gives T_BKT>134K with extended pairs: a deterministic stdlib-only Anderson tight-binding probe (exact tridiagonal diagonalization for DOS+IPR on N=600, transfer-matrix Lyapunov xi_loc on N=20000, Kubo coherence-suppressed stiffness proxy) sweeps W=0..8t and finds the opposite. On-site box disorder manufactures essentially NO excess flat-band weight (DOS spike ratio peaks at only 1.026 -- it broadens the band, it does not pile a degenerate flat band at E_F), so the most-generous FS-capped bare stiffness is only D_s~0.19 meV (T_BKT=3.55K, 38x below the 7.4 meV cuprate scale); and the only W with any excess (W/t~1) is weak-disorder with no real flat band, while pushing W to where DOS would concentrate (W/t>=4) drives xi_loc->a and IPR up (Anderson localization, scaling theory PRL 42 673 1979) so the coherence factor kills D_s->0 (Kohn PR 133 A171 1964; Kolar-Heikkila-Torma arXiv:2510.05224 disorder superfluid weight 'typically vanishing'). Decisive honest-null F_NULL TRIGGERS (1/5 pass). Same no-free-lunch: the randomness that flattens the band is the randomness that localizes the carriers -- manufactured geometry carries zero phase coherence. Confirms the wall via a new (disorder-induced) flat-band ORIGIN. is_green=false, absorbed=false.
